user.title: Wallet Assistant
user.description: Set up Wallet Assistant for loyalty cards, vouchers, and promotions.

init.title: Wallet Assistant options
init.description: Configure price-watch search services. Use one service per line as Name|URL, and include {query} where the filter text should be inserted. Prefix a line with # to disable it.

error.invalid_price_watch_services: Each enabled or disabled service line must be Name|https://example.com/search?q={query}.
